solutions.solution: c; Brother of mother ⇒ uncle; Uncle's son ⇒ cousin.
a; Mahesh's father's only son ⇒ Mahesh; Mahesh's sister ⇒ his aunt. So, the man is Mahesh's son.
d; Your mother's husband ⇒ your father; Your father's sister ⇒ your lady's aunt is man's aunt and therefore lady is man's sister.
a; Daughter of uncle's father ⇒ mother; Mother's sister ⇒ mother.
d; Son of Y's son ⇒ Y's grandson; brother of Y's grandson ⇒ brother.

c; Neelam's father is Deepak. Deepika's mother is Rekha. Deepak is the child of Ramlal. So, Deepak's younger sister Rekha is the daughter of Ramlal. So, Ramlal is the father of Rekha and grandfather of Deepika.
b; A is the brother of F, who is the daughter of D. So, A is the son of D. P is the brother of D. So, P is the uncle of A.

c; P, Q and R are children of the same parents. So, S, who is R's mother, and T, who is P's father, will be the mother and the father of all the three. However, it is not mentioned whether Q is a male or female. So, (c) cannot be definitely true.

c; K is the brother of N and X. So, Y, who is the mother of N, and Z, who is the father of K, will be the mother and father of all the three. However, it is not mentioned whether N is a male or female. So, the statement (c) cannot be definitely true.
d; C is B's daughter and D is B's son. So, D is the brother of C. E is a male married to C. So, E is the husband of C, whose brother is D. So, D is the brother-in-law of E.
a; B is the child of C but not daughter, means B is the son of C. Also, A is the son of C. So, A is the brother of B.
c; D is the brother of B, who is the daughter of A. So, D is the son of A. C is the brother of A. Thus, C is the uncle of D.
d; Q is the brother of R. T is the brother of S, who is the daughter of R. So, T and S are cousins of Q.
c; Shalini is Meena's stepdaughter, means she is the daughter of the elder wife of Rohan. So, Shalini is the daughter of Lakshmi, or Lakshmi is the mother of Shalini.

b; C is A's father's nephew, means C is the son of A's father's brother, i.e. E is the cousin of A. D is also A's cousin. So, D must be a sibling of C. But D is not brother of C. So, D must be the sister of C.
a; Grandmother is one female, mother is another, wives of four sons are the four females and two daughters of all four sons are eight females. So, all there are 1 + 1 + 4 + 8 = 14 females.
